title: Flodesk vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Flodesk vs Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your needs.
intro: Flodesk and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Flodesk excels at beautiful email design with flat-rate pricing, while Sendinblue offers a comprehensive CRM suite with SMS and transactional capabilities. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right tool for your business.

comparison_table.tool_b: Transactional email, SMS, and multi-channel campaigns

comparison_table.tool_a: Stunning templates, unlimited subscribers, workflows, checkout forms
comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, transactional API, CRM, chat features

choose_a_if: You prioritize beautiful email design and template aesthetics for visual content
You want unlimited subscribers under a simple flat-rate pricing structure
You're a designer, photographer, or creative brand focused on email marketing only
choose_b_if: You need a complete CRM suite with email, SMS, WhatsApp, and chat capabilities
You want to start free or need transactional email API functionality
You're building an ecommerce business requiring multi-channel customer engagement

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Flodesk excels for design-focused email marketing with higher customer satisfaction ratings (4.8 on G2), while Sendinblue offers broader functionality as an all-in-one CRM with SMS, WhatsApp, and transactional features. Choose Flodesk for email design, Sendinblue for omnichannel marketing.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is cheaper if you're starting out, offering a free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers and 300 daily emails. Flodesk has no free tier and starts at $38/month but includes unlimited subscribers. For budget-conscious beginners, Sendinblue wins; for growing businesses needing unlimited contacts, Flodesk offers better long-term value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, most email platforms allow you to export your contact lists and subscriber data. Both tools support standard import/export formats, though you'll need to recreate workflows and campaigns manually in your new platform. Plan the migration carefully to avoid losing email history or campaign data.
